title: Valid login redirects to appropriate dashboard
description: Verify that a user with correct credentials can successfully log in and is redirected to their respective dashboard with the user identity displayed in the header.

steps.description: Navigate to the login page
Enter valid username and password
Click the login button
Confirm user is redirected to the correct dashboard for their role
Verify user identity information is shown in the header

title: Invalid login shows error message
description: Ensure that login fails gracefully when incorrect credentials are provided, displaying an appropriate error notification.

steps.description: Navigate to the login page
Input invalid username or password
Click the login button
Verify login is prevented and an error message is shown

title: Role-based UI restrictions prevent unauthorized actions
description: Validate that UI elements and actions restricted to certain roles (like Accept/Reject order) are hidden or disabled for users without the required permissions.

steps.description: Log in as a user without admin, designer, or lab role
Navigate to orders page
Check that Accept and Reject buttons on orders are not visible or disabled
Attempt to perform restricted API calls (if possible)
Verify that backend prevents forbidden actions

title: Dashboard displays real-time statistics and alerts accurately
description: Ensure that dashboard cards display up-to-date statistics, workload indicators, and alerts related to rejected, overdue, and pending approval orders.

steps.description: Log in as authorized user
Navigate to the dashboard page
Verify statistics cards show correct count values consistent with backend data
Check alerts section correctly lists rejected, overdue, and pending approval orders
Trigger a change in order status to a rejected state
Confirm dashboard alerts update accordingly without refresh

title: Orders list loads with pagination, filtering, and search
description: Validate that the orders management list page loads correctly, supports pagination, filtering by status and other parameters, and search functionality returns accurate results.

steps.description: Navigate to the orders page
Check that orders are loaded and displayed with pagination controls
Apply filters such as status = 'Pending Review'
Verify orders list updates to show only matching orders
Perform a search using order identifiers or doctor names
Check the search output contains only relevant orders
Navigate through multiple pages using pagination controls
Confirm new pages load correctly and pagination is consistent

title: Create, update, and delete an order
description: Verify full CRUD lifecycle of orders including creating a new order, editing existing orders, and deleting orders with appropriate validations and updates shown in the UI.

steps.description: Open new order form and enter valid order details
Submit the form to create the order
Verify new order appears in orders list
Select an existing order and edit details
Save the changes
Check order details reflect updated data
Delete an order and confirm deletion
Ensure the order is removed from the list

title: Add, save, and persist comments on orders
description: Check that comments can be added to orders, saved successfully, and persist after page refresh or navigation away and back.

steps.description: Open an order from the orders list
Add a new comment in the comments section
Save the comment
Verify the new comment is visible immediately
Reload the order page
Confirm the comment remains visible after reload

title: Order status lifecycle transitions including accept, reject, and delivery
description: Validate proper transitions between order statuses from Pending Review through Accept, Reject, Adjustment requests, and Delivered, ensuring UI and backend consistency.

steps.description: Locate an order in Pending Review status
Perform Accept action as an authorized user
Confirm status changes to Accepted and reflects in UI
Perform Reject action with reason
Confirm order moves to Rejected status and reason is recorded
Request adjustment on an order and verify status updates
Mark order as Delivered
Verify final Delivered status and absence from pending lists

title: Doctor management create and edit workflows
description: Test the user interface and backend for creating new doctor records and editing existing ones including custom pricing, ensuring data is stored and reflected properly.

steps.description: Navigate to Doctors management page
Create a new doctor with valid details and custom pricing
Verify new doctor appears in the list with correct details
Select a doctor to edit details
Modify data and save changes
Confirm updated doctor information is displayed correctly

title: Supplier management with custom pricing adjustments
description: Validate the ability to add new suppliers, edit existing supplier details, and customize pricing rules with data persistence and accurate listing.

steps.description: Navigated to the Suppliers page
Add a supplier with necessary information and custom pricing
New supplier appears correctly in the list
Edit pricing details for an existing supplier
Save changes
Verify updated pricing is reflected in the supplier details

title: Finance module transaction tracking and summary
description: Verify that income and expense transactions can be viewed, filtered, and summarized correctly, including transaction details on the Finance page.

steps.description: Navigate to Finance page
List all recent income and expense transactions
Apply filters by date range and type (income/expense)
Verify filtered transactions correspond to criteria
Select a transaction to view detailed information
Correct transaction details are displayed

title: Account statements display for doctors and suppliers
description: Check that account statements for doctors and suppliers show comprehensive financial overviews including balances, transactions, and summaries.

steps.description: Open the Accounts page
Select a doctor to view account statement
Verify that detailed financial information is shown accurately
Switch to supplier account statements and repeat verification

title: Analytics and AI-powered insights update accurately
description: Validate that analytics pages display reports and charts based on current data and AI insights update accordingly to reflect new input data.

steps.description: Navigate to Analytics page
Verify that order and revenue reports display correct and current data
Navigate to AI Analytics page
Check AI-powered insights appear and update after data changes
Modify order data and refresh analytics
Confirm analytics and AI insights reflect updated data

title: Designer-specific dashboard shows targeted workflow data
description: Ensure that users with the designer role see a specialized dashboard with relevant workload indicators and quick actions tailored for design-related tasks.

steps.description: Log in as a designer role user
Navigate to the Designer Dashboard page
Verify dashboard shows workflow efficiency statistics and relevant quick action buttons
Confirm no unauthorized elements from other roles are present

title: Export utilities generate correct Excel files and print views
description: Test that the export to Excel and print functionalities for orders and reports produce accurate, well-formatted output without errors.

steps.description: Navigate to Orders or Analytics page
Initiate export to Excel
Download completes and Excel file opens with correct data and formatting
Initiate print preview
Printed view displays all data correctly formatted and legible
